overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a journey on the NCART elevated train through Night City. The clip transitions from the train's interior with visible passengers to an exterior aerial flight through the neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape with towering skyscrapers and flying vehicles, before returning to the train interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train car interior with neon-lit city visible through windows

agents.ego_description: sitting in a train car looking out the window at passing neon signs and buildings

notable_agents.action: woman with braided hair sitting and looking at a handheld device
child in bright blue jacket looking out the train window

entered.detail: brown leather train seats with metal handrails and seated passengers
large panoramic window showing the passing cityscape
bright cyan neon sign with text MONROE & S visible through window

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside an elevated train car with passengers seated on brown leather seats. Through the large windows, neon-lit buildings and cyan signage flash by as the train moves through the cyberpunk city. A woman with braided hair sits in the foreground looking at her device while a child in a blue jacket looks out at the passing scenery.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of dense cyberpunk downtown with towering skyscrapers

events.description: camera transitions from train interior to exterior aerial view flying through the city
flying aerodyne vehicles pass between the skyscrapers in the distance

agents.ego_description: flying freely through the cityscape observing the neon skyline and towering structures

notable_agents.action: flying car moving between skyscrapers against the night sky

entered.detail: tall building with prominent red neon signage reading DECKER, TANAKA & CO
iconic cylindrical tower with distinctive red lighting at the top
large vertical digital billboard advertising NO-TELL MOTEL with female figure
colorful advertisement for Sojack Machiatto with EXPLOSION OF TASTE text

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to an exterior aerial view flying through Night City's dense downtown. Towering skyscrapers covered in neon signage surround the camera, including the red-lit Arasaka Tower and buildings with large digital billboards. Flying vehicles navigate between the buildings as the camera moves through the open sky above the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow maintenance corridors between high-rise buildings

events.description: camera moves from open sky into tight narrow passages between concrete buildings

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight industrial passages between closely packed structures

entered.detail: gray concrete exterior wall with small windows and industrial fixtures
large metal ventilation units and exhaust fans mounted on building exterior

segments.scene_description: The camera descends into narrow corridors between the city's massive buildings, transitioning from open sky to enclosed industrial spaces. Concrete walls and large ventilation units fill the frame as the camera navigates through the tight maintenance passages between structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train car interior returning to passenger view

events.description: camera re-enters the train interior showing the same passengers from the beginning

agents.ego_description: back inside the train car continuing the journey with the same passengers visible

notable_agents.action: same woman with braided hair still seated looking at her device
child in blue jacket looking around the train car interior

entered.detail: same brown leather train seats with the returning passengers
window showing passing city buildings and neon lights

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions back to the train interior, showing the same brown leather seats and passengers from the opening sequence. The woman with braided hair and the child in the blue jacket are visible again as the train continues moving through the neon-lit city, visible through the large windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins inside a commuter train, glides through the sprawling neon skyline of Night City, and eventually returns to the train's interior. It begins within the cabin among passengers on brown leather seats, where a woman with braided hair and a child in a blue jacket watch cyan signage flash past the windows. The perspective then seamlessly shifts to an exterior aerial flight, soaring past towering skyscrapers and the red-lit Arasaka Tower while flying vehicles navigate the open sky. As the camera descends, the wide cityscape narrows into enclosed industrial corridors filled with concrete walls and large ventilation units. Finally, the view transitions back inside the train car, returning to the same passengers and leather seating as the neon city continues to blur past the glass.
